BLOCKED_TERMS = frozenset({"spam", "junk", "trash", "garbage", "waste"})
VALID_ROLES = frozenset({"read", "write", "admin", "delete"})
HANDLED_EVENT_TYPES = frozenset({"click", "submit", "hover", "focus", "blur"})
SENSITIVE_KEYS = frozenset({"password", "token", "secret", "api_key", "credential"})


def filter_items(items: list[str]) -> list[str]:
    return [item for item in items if item not in BLOCKED_TERMS]


def check_permissions(user: dict) -> bool:
    role = user.get("role", "")
    return role in VALID_ROLES


def process_events(events: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    return [event for event in events if event["type"] in HANDLED_EVENT_TYPES]


def validate_input(data: dict) -> bool:
    return not any(key in SENSITIVE_KEYS for key in data)
